free_text: The same as report, final version
Gamma-Ray Production Cross Sections for Carbon and
liquid scintillator for neutron flux monitors.
Neutron flux measured by calibrated NE-211 plastic
radioactive sources. Relative efficiency at gamma-
ray energies greater than 2.754 MeV obtained from
thermal capture gamma intensities of Fe, Cl, Cr.
Data given have been corrected for neutron and gamma
attenuation, multiple scattering effects, and for the
spatial dependence of gamma-ray detector system.
Data errors given include the following:
